account_id.description: Appcues account ID; every resource path is scoped to accounts/{account_id}/...

username.description: Appcues API key, used as the HTTP Basic auth username.

password.description: Appcues API secret, used as the HTTP Basic auth password; never logged.

base_url.description: Appcues API base URL override for tests or proxies.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
